data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_NeedCoinCas: Okay, you wanted some COINS for\nthe games?\pBut you don't have a COIN CASE for\nstowing the COINS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_WereYouLook: Were you looking for COINS?\pIt's ¥1000 for 50 COINS.\nWould you like some?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ThankYouHer: Thank you very much!\nHere are your COINS!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontHaveEno: Um... You don't appear to have\nenough money...
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontNeedCoi: Oh... You don't need COINS, then?\nGood luck on your adventure!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181DB2: It's ¥1,000 for 50 COINS.\nWould you like some?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ExchangeCoi: Welcome.\pYou can exchange your COINS for\nprizes here.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_SendToYourH: Thank you!\nWe'll send it to your PC at home.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181E93: There isn't any room available for\nplacing {STR_VAR_1}.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_OhIsThatSo: Oh, is that so? \nYou need to save some COINS before\lcoming back here.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181F15: Oh, you can't carry any more than that.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_GotTwoOfSam: I made a mistake and got two of the\nsame DOLLS.\pWould you like one of them?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_YouWantItBu: Huh?\nYou want it, but not right now?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontBeNegat: Oh, don't be so negative!\nYou can have this!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CantWinJack: There's a prize I want, but I can't win\nthe jackpot.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_NeedCoinCas: Hey, kid, if you want to play here,\nyou need a COIN CASE.\pI think the young lady next door\nhad one. Go see her!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_LuckOnlyLas: My luck can only last so long.\nThis is too much for me.\lHere, take some COINS!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_MauvilleSom: MAUVILLE has something for\neveryone.\pFor me, it's the GAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteTab: The ROULETTE tables have different\nrates.\pCheck your COINS if you're going to\npick a table.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_EasyToLoseT: It's easy to lose track of time in here. \nI should get back to work.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CoinsAreNee: COINS are needed to play here in the\nGAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteOnl: This ROULETTE thing...\nIt's rather demanding.\pWin or lose, it's only by luck.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_UpTo3CoinsC: Up to three COINS can be used to play\nthe SLOTS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DifficultTo: It's very difficult to make it stop\nright on “7.”\pIf it stops on “7” during the REEL TIME\nbonus game, you'll receive extra COINS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_HeresSomeSl:
Here's some information for you
about the SLOTS.\pThe more lightning bolts you stock, the
more REEL TIME chances you get.\pIn a game with the maximum five REEL
TIME chances...\pIt is possible to receive four regular
bonuses, then a big bonus.\pThe big bonus is 660 COINS, but it's
very difficult to get.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CantPlayWit: You can't play if you don't have a\nCOIN CASE.
